description: Baseline: 3 test failures (2 flaky engine tests with 2s timeout too tight). total_tests needs fix in script.
fix: increase engine test timeouts from 2s to 10s — fixes 3 flaky tests in claude/codex/pi
feat: add hal status --json command with v1 workflow state machine contract (internal/status package + cmd/status.go + 14 new tests)
feat: add hal doctor --json command with v1 health contract — engine-aware (skips codex checks for pi/claude), 13 new tests
fix: isolate Codex linker from real ~/.codex in tests — CodexLinker respects $HOME env, init tests use t.Setenv, 2 new isolation tests
fix: remove 'legacy' label from hal report — now 'Generate summary report for completed work', update root help to include status/doctor
feat: add --json flag to hal run — outputs structured RunResult contract with ok/iterations/complete/summary
feat: add --json shorthand to hal analyze alongside --format json, with conflict guard
feat: expand hal cleanup to remove orphaned rules/ directory, add 2 new tests
feat: add --json flag to hal report — outputs structured ReportResult contract with reportPath/summary/recommendations
feat: add --json flag to hal auto — outputs structured AutoResult contract
feat: add --json flag to hal validate — outputs ValidationResult as JSON
feat: add --json flag to hal init — outputs structured InitResult with created/skipped files
feat: add --json flag to hal convert — outputs structured ConvertResult with outputPath/valid
feat: add --json flag to hal cleanup — outputs structured CleanupResult with removed items list
docs: improve hal init help — explicitly separates repo-local, engine-local, and global (~/.codex) side effects
test: add status, doctor, cleanup, convert to core metadata contract tests — locks Example/Long/Short/Use
feat: add --json flag to hal config — outputs config existence, path, and content as JSON
feat: doctor detects legacy debris (.goralph, ralph links, rules/) — warns with remediation hint, 2 new tests
feat: add --json flag to hal standards list — outputs count and index as JSON
feat: add --json flag to hal review — outputs ReviewLoopResult directly, skips glamour rendering
feat: enrich status with manual detail (story counts, nextStory, branchName), compound detail (step, branch), paths — 5 new tests
feat: enrich human-readable status with story counts, branch, next story, compound step — 1 new test
feat: add --json flag to hal archive list — outputs ArchiveInfo array with JSON tags, date/feature/stats
